home.heroTitle: ClientSignal connects attorneys with clients who truly need them
home.heroDesc: AI-verified leads for modern law firms. Smart intake, instant alerts, and qualified cases for Personal Injury, Criminal Law, Immigration, Family Law, and Employment Law.
home.socialProof: Built on the standards legal professionals trust
home.forClientsTitle: Get matched with the right attorney.
home.forClientsDesc: Describe your situation once, get matched with a verified attorney, and track your whole case — messages, documents and status — in one place. Always free.
home.forAttorneysTitle: Grow your practice with qualified clients.
home.forAttorneysDesc: Receive vetted, scored, exclusive client opportunities matched to your practice areas and jurisdiction, then respond before anyone else.
home.step1Desc: Clients and attorneys each get a secure, dedicated workspace.
home.step2Desc: Clients outline their case; attorneys verify their license and areas.
home.step3Desc: Every attorney is license-checked; every case is scored and routed.
home.step4Desc: Message, share documents and track everything in one dashboard.
home.realOutcomes: Real attorneys. Real clients. Real outcomes.
home.licenseVerifiedDesc: Every attorney's bar license, identity and firm are confirmed within 24 hours of joining — no exceptions.
home.privateEncryptedDesc: Client information is encrypted and shared only with a matched attorney. Never sold, never spammed.
home.fastExclusiveDesc: Cases are routed to one attorney at a time — not blasted to ten — so clients get real attention, fast.
home.readyForLeads: Ready for vetted, trusted, qualified leads?
home.startWithClientSignal: Start with ClientSignal, then book time to review the right package for your firm.

forClients.heroDesc: Tell us what happened once. We match you with a verified, licensed attorney who handles your kind of case — and they reach out fast, usually within minutes. No fees, no spam.
forClients.describeYourSituationDesc: A short, guided form — adapts to your case type.
forClients.weVerifyMatchDesc: Routed to a licensed attorney who handles your case.
forClients.theyReachOutDesc: Talk directly and decide if it's the right fit.
forClients.trackEverythingDesc: Status, documents and messages in your dashboard.
forClients.whatKindOfHelp: What kind of help do you need?
forClients.bankLevelEncryptionDesc: Everything you share is encrypted and stored securely.
forClients.verifiedAttorneysOnlyDesc: Every attorney's license & identity is confirmed before they join.
forClients.neverSoldSpammedDesc: Your details go only to your matched attorney — never to a list.
forClients.ctaDesc: It takes a few minutes and it's completely free. The sooner you start, the sooner the right attorney can help.

forAttorneys.heroTitle: Vetted. Trusted. Qualified leads, delivered instantly.
forAttorneys.heroDesc: ClientSignal is the modern intake and lead-routing platform built for solos and small firms. We verify every lead, score every case, and deliver only qualified clients.
forAttorneys.urgencyDesc: Medical treatment, police report, active pain
forAttorneys.problemTitle: Clients are reaching out. Firms are not responding fast enough.
forAttorneys.problemDesc: The result is missed cases, lost revenue, and frustrated clients. ClientSignal fixes this.
forAttorneys.problem1: 78% of clients hire the first attorney who responds.
forAttorneys.problem2: Solos lose 30-40% of leads due to slow intake.
forAttorneys.problem3: Manual intake is chaotic, inconsistent, and expensive.
forAttorneys.problem4: Most lead-gen companies send unverified, low-quality cases.
forAttorneys.smartIntake: Smart Intake. Instant Alerts. Better Clients.
forAttorneys.aiVerifiedLeads: AI-verified leads for modern law firms.
forAttorneys.aiVerifiedDesc: Connecting attorneys with clients who truly need them. More clients. Less noise. Better cases.
forAttorneys.vettedLeadsDesc: Every inquiry is screened for contact accuracy, intent, and case type.
forAttorneys.trustedSourcesDesc: No spam, no bots, no recycled leads.
forAttorneys.qualifiedCasesDesc: Cases are scored and routed instantly to the right attorney.
forAttorneys.realTimeAlertsDesc: Text, email, or in-app signal so your firm can respond first.
forAttorneys.fourSteps: Four steps from inquiry to engagement.
forAttorneys.workflow1Desc: They submit a short intake form through your website, landing page, or ClientSignal link.
forAttorneys.workflow2Title: We verify and score the lead
forAttorneys.workflow2Desc: ClientSignal checks for accuracy, intent, practice area, urgency, and supporting documents.
forAttorneys.workflow3Desc: Text, email, or in-app alert. Your firm chooses the routing channel.
forAttorneys.workflow4Title: You engage first and win the case
forAttorneys.workflow4Desc: Speed plus verification helps raise conversion quality.
forAttorneys.featuresTitle: Everything you need to capture better clients.
forAttorneys.verifiedLeadsDesc: Every inquiry is screened for accuracy, intent, and case type.
forAttorneys.instantAlertsDesc: Get notified the moment a qualified client reaches out.
forAttorneys.smartRoutingDesc: Send the right cases to the right attorney automatically.
forAttorneys.clientMessagingDesc: Respond quickly with built-in SMS and email tools.
forAttorneys.analyticsDashboardDesc: Track lead quality, response times, and conversion rates.
forAttorneys.encryptedIntakeDesc: Sensitive intake and documents are treated as encrypted, secure data.
forAttorneys.practiceAreaTitle: Each practice area asks the questions attorneys actually need.
forAttorneys.practiceAreaDesc: Personal injury gets timelines and documents. Family law gets safety screening. Criminal law gets court urgency. Immigration gets status and document checks. Employment law gets evidence and deadline prompts.
forAttorneys.piTools: Timeline case tracker, document checklist automation, form auto-fill, severity and liability scoring.
forAttorneys.familyTools: Safe-contact prompts, custody and child-risk screening, financial complexity scoring, court-order uploads.
forAttorneys.criminalTools: Custody status, court dates, charges, bail details, prior history, and urgent hearing flags.
forAttorneys.immigrationTools: Status, visa type, I-94, pending applications, hearing risk, deportation urgency, and document uploads.
forAttorneys.employmentTools: Termination, discrimination, wage, retaliation, evidence, and filing-deadline screening.
forAttorneys.pricingTitle: Pick the package that matches your intake motion.
forAttorneys.readyForLeads: Ready for vetted, trusted, qualified leads?

pricing.heroTitle: Four packages built to reduce fear and guide your firm to better cases.
pricing.heroDesc: Entry, Growth, Premium, and practice-area lead packages for Personal Injury, Criminal Law, Immigration, Family Law, and Employment Law.
pricing.entryAndGrowthDesc: Start with the intake features most firms need first
pricing.entryAndGrowthBest: Solos and 2-10 attorney firms that need reliable lead flow without overbuying.
pricing.premiumAndOptionalDesc: Scale high-value practices and specific lead channels
pricing.premiumAndOptionalBest: Established PI, immigration, multi-office, criminal, family, and employment firms.

pricingTiers.entryDesc: For solos and small firms that need controlled intake volume.
pricingTiers.growthDesc: For 2-10 attorney firms scaling intake and referrals.
pricingTiers.premiumDesc: For established, PI, immigration, and multi-office practices.
pricingTiers.optionalLeadsDesc: Add practice-specific pay-per-lead volume when your firm wants more cases.

faq.a1: Yes. Every inquiry is screened for accuracy, intent, contactability, consent, and case type before it is routed.
faq.q2: Do you sell leads to multiple firms?
faq.a2: No. ClientSignal is designed around exclusive leads for the matched firm, not recycled lists or lead blasts.
faq.q3: What practice areas do you cover?
faq.a3: Personal Injury, Criminal Law, Immigration, Family Law, and Employment Law.
faq.a4: Yes. No long contracts or commitments are required in the prototype pricing model.
faq.q5: Do you integrate with my CRM?
faq.a5: The product direction includes Clio, MyCase, Lawmatics, and related intake tools. Final integration scope still needs confirmation.
faq.a6: Client documents and intake data are positioned as encrypted, access-controlled, and shared only with verified attorneys connected to the matter.

footer.tagline: The modern intake and lead-routing platform for attorneys. Verified leads, scored cases, delivered instantly.
